Adds more evidence on same side
Direct explanation of cause or reason

support_punctuation.name: period
support_punctuation.usage_hint: Ends statement; supports by separating clear ideas

support_punctuation.name: semi-colon
support_punctuation.usage_hint: Links closely related, usually same-side ideas

support_punctuation.name: parentheses
support_punctuation.usage_hint: Insert extra supportive or clarifying information
